positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring bioluminescent flora and ancient celestial bodies. Imagine a crescent moon nestled within a dense, intricate canopy of mystical flowers and ferns. The style must be a seamless blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern cosmic psychedelia, utilizing strong silhouette contrast. The palette should be limited to deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing lavender, and rich black, providing maximum contrast for apparel printing. All elements must be clean, defined vectors with crisp edges, suitable for screen printing, emphasizing flowing curves and repeating patterns. Central, balanced composition, high contrast, maximalist yet clean.
